---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What can't you do today?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific about tool names, config keys, etc.

## Alternatives

What alternatives have you considered?

## Example config

```json
{
  "version": 2,
  "ledgers": {
    "new-ledger": {
      "path": "...",
      "schema": ["..."]
    }
  }
}
```

## Additional context

Any other context or related issues.
